problem:
filesystem: edit_file newText interpreted as String.prototype.replace replacement-pattern (literal $ corrupted). ## Summary
`edit_file` in `@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem` silently corrupts content containing literal `$` characters. The root cause is that `applyFileEdits` (in `src/filesystem/lib.ts`) invokes JavaScript's `String.prototype.replace(searchString, replacementString)` where the **second argument is interpreted as a [replacement string pattern](https://developer.mozilla.org/e
